ppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x74ed01eb66b923d0d0cfe3be84604ac04b76482a55f9dd655e1ef4d367f95bc2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5282825a626cfe924e504274b864a652b0023591fa66f06a067b25b51ba9b303","dweb:/ipfs/QmeCfPykghhMc81VJTrHTC7sF6CRvaA1FXVq2pJhwYp1dV"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x304d732678032a9781ae85c8f204c8fba3d3a5e31c02616964e75cfdc5049098","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://299ced486011781dc98f638059678323c03079fefae1482abaa2135b22fa92d0","dweb:/ipfs/QmbZNbcPTBxNvwChavN2kkZZs7xHhYL7mv51KrxMhsMs3j"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0x493033a8d1b176a037b2cc6a04dad01a5c157722049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/CampaignEscrow.sol":{"keccak256":"0xdd91e03203f089283f9773ee4bba3617f52e2af0ad31dd1000b067a8610b591c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8d595b7482cb00d1b536bdc0607918e9b85ed149cdf1d3c37f9fb61d8c6f8131","dweb:/ipfs/QmXTmz6aJyCgto4foq7tP7Lp3vxcy5J31BA2B5c6p33Fnr"]}},"version":1}

params.amount: Token amount (with token decimals) - total including fee

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.campaignId: bytes32 - must match the campaign UUID hash used in deposit

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

deposit(bytes32,uint256).notice: Partner deposits tokens for a campaign.         Platform fee (feeBps, e.g. 0.5%) is deducted; remainder goes to campaign pool.

feeCollector().notice: Address that receives the platform fee

getDepositAmountForPool(uint256).notice: Given desired pool amount, returns total amount partner must deposit (includes fee).         depositAmount = poolAmount * 10000 / (10000 - feeBps)

getFeeAndPoolAmount(uint256).notice: Given deposit amount, returns fee and pool amount after fee.

releaseReward(bytes32,address,uint256).notice: Release reward to quest completer. Called by backend oracle.

rewardReleaser().notice: Authorized address that can release rewards (backend oracle)

rewardToken().notice: Token used for campaign rewards (e.g. USDC)
